chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Spl. STRA 799 of 2019 _______________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge. 1. For orders on office objections 18, 21 & 22 2. For orders on CMA No.3906/2024 3. For hearing of main case 06.11.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for the applicant Under instructions learned counsel for the applicant does not press this reference application which is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Amjad
